summary: AtBat subscriber FGotD out-of-market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is an Audio Only subscriber
AND the FGotD is scheduled/in-progress
AND the FGotD is not in the subscribers viewing market

steps.action: WHEN the user views/focuses the FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon does not display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay over the team colors in the game tile header
AND a Free Game of the Day pill displays left justified at the bottom of the game tile
